name: sdd-delivery
description: Spec-driven delivery workflow for PRD-to-code engineering with traceability, tests, checkpoints, and observability.

interface.shortDescription: PRD-to-Spec delivery workflow for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: SDD Delivery turns PRDs into reviewed Specs, technical solutions, traceable tasks, unit tests, checkpoints, and observable engineering artifacts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $sdd-delivery to turn this PRD into Spec, solution, reviewed implementation tasks, unit tests, and observable delivery artifacts.
